title: Nichodemus Amollo
text:
Hello! Welcome to my portfolio website. Here I share my data science learning, research work and write blogs about a range of topics.
I am a statistician and data scientist. I am currently pursuing my Master’s of Epidemiology and Biostatistics at JOOUST. I am passionate about using statistics and data science to learn from data, developing software to help others learn from data, and training others to do data analysis.
I help organizations to collect, Process, analyze, and communicate data-rom supporting everyday business decisions to driving global change





Collect


I gather data using tools like Kobo Toolbox, web scraping, Airtable, and SQL .





Process


I perform data analysis, exploration, and apply statistical tests using R and Python.





Data Storytelling


I have experience creating interactive and static visualizations that communicate key insights.
